name: goal-me
description: goal-me: design a goal as a machine-verifiable closed loop for /goal

plugins.name: goal-me
plugins.description: Interview-driven skill that turns a vague goal into a machine-verifiable closed loop (precise stop condition, scoped steps, kickoff command) so /goal runs without drifting or burning excess cost. Works for development, research, writing, and investigation; new or existing projects.
